heading: Medical care and treatment of Federal prisoners
label: 250 Medical care and treatment of Federal prisoners
text: The Service shall supervise and furnish medical treatment and other necessary medical, psychiatric, and related technical and scientific services, authorized by , in penal and correctional institutions of the United States.section 4005 of title 18
notes: Codification“” substituted in text for “the Act of , as amended (U.S.C., 1940 edition, title 18, secs. 751, 752)” on authority of , , the first section of which enacted Title 18, Crimes and Criminal Procedure.Section 4005 of title 18act June 25, 1948, ch. 64562 Stat. 684May 13, 1930
